# OwLina AI Studio

OwLina AI Studio is an AI production brand by Alina, AI producer and creative director.

The site presents AI product photography, advertising creatives, AI video, CGI visuals, fashion and beauty campaigns, jewelry visuals, furniture renders, e-commerce content, social media creatives, AI avatar content, and AI influencer content.

OwLina AI Studio works with different niches and adapts the visual style to the specific brand, product, and goal. The production is focused on advertising, e-commerce, social media, and launch content without a physical shoot.

Key pages:
- Home: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/index.html
- Ukrainian home: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/index_.html
- English home: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/en.html
- Projects: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/projects.html
- Static AI creatives: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/static.html
- AI video: https://owlina-ai.github.io/ai-portfolio/videos.html

Contact: owlinaai@gmail.com, https://t.me/OwLinaAI, https://www.instagram.com/owlinaai
